items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主导因子：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→NQ/ES承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金更易回撤；VIX上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Crude Oil Prices Retreat on Hopes the Iran War is Near an End…
- 宏观/Fed线索：S&P 500, Nasdaq Surge as Investors Weigh Fed Comments and Geopolitical D…

items.title: 忽略CoreWeave，3个不烧钱的利润丰厚AI股

items.title_en: Singapore charges one more individual with AI chip fraud

items.title: 华为云计算收入在2025年下降，因为中国的AI落后于美国竞争对手。
items.summary: 当包括内部客户在内时，这家电信巨头表示云计算收入比去年增长。
items.title_en: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
items.summary_en: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.

items.title: 全球星股价大涨15%，因报道亚马逊正在考虑收购该公司。
items.summary: 亚马逊的Leo服务可能将与Globalstar达成协议，增强其正在发展中的从天空获取互联网服务，目前有约200颗卫星在轨。
items.title_en: Globalstar stock surges 15% on report Amazon is weighing an acquisition
items.summary_en: A deal with Globalstar could bolster Amazon Leo, the company's nascent internet-from-space service, which has about 200 satellites in orbit.

items.title: 英特尔股价大涨9%，因公司收购爱尔兰芯片工厂的消息，表明公司的强势回归。
items.summary: 芯片制造商现在将完全拥有Fab 34，花费了14.2亿美元收购了两年前将49%股份出售给阿波罗全球管理的股份。
items.title_en: Intel shares jump 9% after buying back Ireland chip fab in sign of renewed strength
items.summary_en: The semiconductor company will now wholly own Fab 34 after spending $14.2 billion to repurchase the 49% stake it sold to Apollo Global Management two years ago.

items.title: 苹果即将进入第二个世纪面临五大挑战
items.summary: 苹果即将迎来第50个生日，苹果公司面临着接班人问题、人工智能的角色以及是否能维持高端品牌的挑战。
items.title_en: Five key questions Apple faces entering its second half-century
items.summary_en: As Apple turns 50, the iPhone maker faces questions about succession, its role in AI and whether it can maintain a premium brand.

items.title: 维萨推出新一代人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.summary: 维萨公司的新工具是主要银行和金融机构在业务中采用人工智能的更大努力的一部分。
items.title_en: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.summary_en: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.

items.title: 中国人工智能"老虎"智普股价暴涨35%，首次财报收入翻倍
items.summary: 中国人工智能公司智普股价大涨超过30%，这是该公司在上市后首次发布财报，财报显示其收入增长强劲。
items.title_en: Shares of China AI 'tiger' Zhipu surge 35% after revenue doubles in first earnings report
items.summary_en: Shares of Chinese AI company Zhipu surged over 30% in trading, after posting strong revenue growth in its first earnings report since its IPO.

items.title: 微软在华尔街的表现创下2008年以来最差季度，AI担忧令其陷入困境。
items.summary: 今年微软的价值几乎减少了四分之一，投资者将该公司的收益倍数调整至2022年年底以来的最低值。
items.title_en: Microsoft closes worst quarter on Wall Street since 2008 on AI concerns: 'Redmond is in a pickle'
items.summary_en: With Microsoft losing almost a quarter of its value this year, investors have reset the company's earnings multiple to the lowest since late 2022.

items.title: 苹果对 AI 应用程序的打击让它站在了历史的错误一边
items.summary: 苹果公司背离了其50年前创立的使命，阻碍了人工智能编程，或者说是“心灵编程”。
items.title_en: Column: Apple's crackdown on AI apps puts it on the wrong side of history
items.summary_en: Apple is going against its founding mission from 50 years ago by standing in the way AI coding, or vibe-coding.

items.title: OpenAI完成历史性1220亿美元融资轮，市盈率预计将进一步上涨
items.summary: 总共募集了1220亿美元的认可资金，高于之前公布的1100亿美元。
items.title_en: OpenAI closes record-breaking $122 billion funding round as anticipation builds for IPO
items.summary_en: The round totaled $122 billion of committed capital, up from the $110 billion figure that was previously announced.

items.title: 亚马逊同意与团结工会的案件和解，指控该公司对罢工工人采取报复行动。
items.summary: 团体工会称亚马逊非法扣除员工未取的假期时间，称这种做法是“非法胁迫”。
items.title_en: Amazon settles Teamsters case alleging it retaliated against striking workers
items.summary_en: The Teamsters alleged Amazon illegally docked employees' unpaid time off after they walked off the job, calling the practice "unlawfully coercive."

items.title: 甲骨文公司继续裁员数千人，公司继续增加人工智能支出。
items.summary: 甲骨文公司加大了资本支出，以建设能够处理人工智能负载的数据中心基础设施。
items.title_en: Oracle cutting thousands in latest layoff round as company continues to ramp AI spending
items.summary_en: Oracle has ratcheted up its capital expenditures as it builds data center infrastructure that can handle AI workloads.

items.title: Marvel尔股价大涨13%，因Nvidia投资2亿美元，继续类似的押注。

items.title_en: Marvell stock pops 13% as Nvidia takes $2 billion stake, continuing run of similar bets
items.summary_en: Nvidia has also made $2 billion investments in CoreWeave, Nebius and Coherent in recent months.

items.title: 特朗普威胁对伊朗进行“极其严厉”的打击，震惊亚洲股市、美股期货和油价。
items.summary: 投资者情绪迅速恶化，特朗普的演讲继续进行，亚洲市场和美国债券都下跌。
items.title_en: Trump’s threat to hit Iran 'extremely hard' jolts Asian stocks, U.S. futures and oil

items.title: 亚太市场反转为跌，油价大涨，随着特朗普关于伊朗战争的讲话
items.summary: 特朗普在演讲中重申，美国在伊朗的目标已经基本实现，并说“我们已经掌握了所有牌”。
items.title_en: Asia-Pacific markets reverse gains as oil surges after Trump's speech on Iran war
items.summary_en: During his speech, Trump reiterated that the U.S. objectives in Iran were almost met and said that "we have all the cards" in the conflict.

items.title: 石油价格上涨，布伦特原油价格大涨近6%，特朗普对伊朗战争的演讲加剧了进一步升级的恐惧。
items.summary: 石油价格在波动的交易中上涨，因为特朗普在对伊朗战争的讲话中表示，他预计冲突将持续另外两到三个星期。
items.title_en: Oil gains with Brent surging nearly 6% as Trump's Iran war speech stokes fears of further escalation
items.summary_en: Oil rose in volatile trading as Trump in his address to the nation on Iran war said that he expected the conflict to last another two to three weeks.

items.title: 国际能源局警告称，4月份石油供应紧张会进一步恶化，考虑释放更多战略储备。
items.summary: 国际能源组织的执行总干事Fatih Birol也警告称，伊朗战争造成了历史上最严重的石油危机。
items.title_en: Oil supply crunch will worsen in April, IEA warns as it weighs releasing more strategic reserves
items.summary_en: The organization’s Executive Director Fatih Birol also warned that the Iran war had created the worst oil crisis in history.

items.title: 伊朗战争正给电动汽车需求带来一股新动力 —— 就在汽车巨头们正准备转向汽油发动机的时候。
items.summary: 自中东危机爆发以来，多家汽车销售平台都报告了电动汽车（EV）消费者兴趣的急剧增加。
items.title_en: EV demand is getting a boost from the Iran war — just as auto giants pivot back to combustion engines
items.summary_en: Various car selling platforms have reported a sharp increase in consumer interest for EVs since the Middle East crisis began.

items.title: 美股期货下跌，特朗普称美国即将完成伊朗目标
items.summary: 美国股指期货周三晚下跌，因为特朗普总统没有给投资者提供任何减轻与伊朗冲突的迹象，但再次提出了完成行动的时间表，称将很快结束。
items.title_en: Stock futures sink as Trump says U.S. on track to complete Iran objectives ‘very shortly’
items.summary_en: U.S. stock futures sank Wednesday night as President Donald Trump didn’t offer investors any new indications of de-escalation in the conflict with Iran, but again laid out a timetable of finishing the operation “very shortly.”

items.title: 伊朗的战争宣传重点集中在特朗普身上，使用乐高形象做出嘲讽。
items.summary: 伊朗宣传机器也开始关注这场战争对全球经济和能源价格的不稳定影响，后者在美国已经大幅上涨。
items.title_en: Iran's war propaganda homes in on Trump with Lego memes
items.summary_en: Iranian propaganda is also homing in on the war's destabilizing impact on the global economy and energy prices, which have shot up in the U.S.

items.summary_en: The 10-year Treasury yield ticked up on Wednesday as investors assessed the prospect of a resolution to the conflict in the Middle East.

items.summary: 美国和以色列在2月底发动对伊朗的袭击，引发了经济混乱和全球能源大规模中断。

items.summary_en: The war began in late February when the U.S. and Israel launched strikes on Iran, causing economic turmoil and massive global energy disruptions.

items.title: 伊朗威胁Nvidia、苹果和其他科技巨头遭受攻击
items.summary: 伊朗革命卫队警告了多家在中东地区运营的科技公司，称他们将被视为“合法目标”。
items.title_en: Iran threatens Nvidia, Apple and other tech giants with attacks

items.title: 日本大型企业在伊朗战争的阴影下仍保持乐观态度，但这种乐观可能不会持续很久。

items.title_en: Big Japanese companies are feeling optimistic despite the Iran war — but it might not last
